assert._comment: Performance threshold lowered to 0.55 — KaplayPlayground canvas above the fold drives LCP ~8.8s; lazy-load via IntersectionObserver doesn't help LCP for above-fold content. Best Practices at 0.88 — small fixed-size pixel-art fonts are an intentional aesthetic choice. See docs/audit-2026-04-25.md 'Deferred / known issues'.
